title: ulmus campestris var. minor
intro: Ulmus campestris var. minor, also known as the dwarf or field elm, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the elm family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ulmus campestris var. minor include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a wound-healing agent due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Ulmus campestris var. minor include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
